入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Metal-Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak Event
イベント: Rare Pick - Metal-Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak Event

カードの効果.発動効果: During your opponent’s next turn, all of your [Metal] Pokémon take −20 damage from attacks from your opponent’s Pokémon.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
